summary: First MVP iteration test of SPOTLIGHT / Artist Vault. Backend pytest suite (13/13 PASS) and Playwright E2E (17/17 PASS) both green. All listed features verified end-to-end: register/login (admin + new user), JWT in localStorage av_token, artists grid (12 cards) + search filter, spot/unspot with position + tier toast, vault cards w/ tier rail + PNG download, leaderboard, navbar nav, logout, protected /vault redirect, logged-out Spot -> /auth redirect.
critical_code_review_comments: CORS is allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False — fine for Bearer token flow used by FE, but the backend ALSO sets an httpOnly cookie on login/register that the FE will never read or auto-send (FE strips it because of allow_credentials=False and uses Bearer from body). The cookie is dead weight; either remove the set_cookie calls or wire credentials properly. Low priority but worth cleaning up.
Discover.jsx: useEffect dep is [user] but `load` is defined in render scope. Works because load is called explicitly; no bug, just brittle if refactored.
AuthContext.jsx: useEffect runs only once on mount. If 401 occurs later, token isn't auto-cleared. Minor.
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); FastAPI recommends lifespan handlers. Non-blocking.
Leaderboard pipeline does ObjectId(r['_id']) inside a try/except that returns 'Anonymous' on failure — safe but silent. Consider logging.

shareCard.js: image is loaded with crossOrigin='anonymous'. Unsplash returns CORS headers; canvas.toDataURL works in test. If a future image host blocks CORS, the catch will skip drawing and PNG will still download (graceful).
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes — testing was smooth.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@artistvault.com / vault123. New users registered via /api/auth/register with @example.com domains (Pydantic EmailStr rejects .test TLD).
seed_data_creation: Test users created with prefix test_<uuid>@example.com; 12 seeded artists already present (backend startup seed). No manual seeding required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_artist_vault.py covers auth + artists + spot/unspot + vault + stats + leaderboard. Use @example.com emails (Pydantic EmailStr rejects .test/.local). JWT token is in BOTH response body AND httpOnly cookie, but frontend only uses body token via localStorage av_token. CORS is allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False. Seed artist spot_count is random (2-120) so positions are not deterministic.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects discovered. Initial test failures were due to test-side use of `.test` TLD which Pydantic EmailStr correctly rejects; fixed in test file by using @example.com.
